title: Settings
syncOnDesc: Your data is securely encrypted and backed up on a secure server. If you lose or change your device, you can restore your data. You can share the wedding with your partner via the invite link below.
syncOffDesc: Your data is stored only on this device. If you delete the app, clear your browser cache, or lose your device, all your data will be permanently lost. Enable backup to protect your data and share the wedding with your partner.
syncStatusOffline: Offline — will back up on reconnect
syncStatusReadOnly: View-only access — your changes won't be saved
sendLinkToJoin: Send a link to join this wedding
scanFromOtherDevice: Scan this code from the other device to join the wedding
newWeddingConfirm: You already have {{count}} wedding(s). Create a new wedding? You can switch between weddings at any time.
disableLockMsg: The app will no longer be protected by a PIN.
premiumPitch: Partner sharing, full public page. One-time lifetime purchase.
premiumBenefit2: Share the wedding with your partner
premiumBenefit3: Full public wedding page for guests
premiumInviteLocked: Share the wedding with your partner — Premium required
premiumPageFreeLimit: Limited public page (name, date, venue only)
noServerOrPassword: No server or password configured for this wedding.
noPassword: No password associated with this wedding.
analyticsOnDesc: Anonymous usage data helps improve the app. No personal data is collected.
analyticsOffDesc: Usage analytics are disabled. No data is collected or sent.
importConfirmMsg: This will replace all current data for this wedding. Continue?
invalidJson: The file does not contain valid JSON.
invalidBackup: This file is not a valid Fiancé backup.
importToSpaceDesc: Import a legacy backup to the server
importToSpaceConfirmMsg: Data will be added to your backup space. Continue?
importToSpaceNoSession: Backup not active. Enable backup to import.
importToSpaceFailed: Import failed. Check your connection and try again.
deleteWeddingMsg: All data for "{{label}}" will be permanently deleted from this device.
resyncWeddingDesc: The backup service changed. Reconnect this wedding to keep backing up.
resyncWeddingMsg: Existing invite and RSVP links will stop working — you'll need to reshare them after. Your data stays on this device during the process.
notificationsOnDesc: You'll receive reminders for tasks and appointments
publicPageDesc: Info, schedule, and FAQ shared with your guests
publicPageInfoDesc: This information will be visible on your public page.
eventPhotosDesc: Upload and manage photos from your event
eventPhotosSubtitle: Add photos from your wedding. They can be shared with guests on the public page.
eventPhotosEmptyDesc: Add photos from your wedding to share with guests
configureFaqDesc: Set up FAQ for your guests
faqSubtitle: Add questions and answers for your guests. They will be visible on the public wedding page.
faqAnswerPlaceholder: E.g., Yes, free parking is available on site.
timelinePreviewDesc: Day-of moments marked as public. Tap to edit.
timelinePreviewEmpty: No public moments yet. Edit a Day-of moment and enable "Visible on shared timeline".
giftRegistryDesc: Manage your gift list, visible on the public page
documentsDesc: Quotes, contracts and files linked to your vendors and guests
migrationDetectedMsg: You have local data not yet backed up. Would you like to migrate it to your backup space now?
migrationSectionDesc: Have local data not yet backed up? Back it up first, then import the file into your backup space.
migrationBackupDesc: Download a JSON file of all your data
migrationImportDesc: Pick the file and upload it to your backup space
backupSectionDesc: Export or import all your data
samplesSectionDesc: Import a pre-filled wedding to explore the app (intimate, classic, or large).
samplesImportConfirmMsg: The "{{label}}" sample will replace all current data for this wedding. Continue?
rsvpSectionDesc: Allow your guests to confirm attendance online
syncRequiredRsvp: Enable backup to manage online RSVP
syncRequiredShare: Enable backup to share your public page
publicPageIncompleteHint: Enter both partner names to share the page.
shareError: Couldn't generate the link, please try again
inviteErrorBody: Backup couldn't create the link. Check your connection, then try again.
manageDayOfDesc: Edit public moments in Day-of planning

pinSetup.confirmSubtitle: Enter the same code to confirm

premiumBetaNote: During the beta, every premium feature is available for free. Purchasing now supports development and locks in lifetime access when the beta ends.
importExternalChooserDesc: Choose the source of your guest list.
mariagesNetStep1: 1. On a computer, open the “Guests” section of mariages.net
mariagesNetStep2: 2. Click “Download” to get the Excel file (e.g. Invités-07-02-2026.xlsx)
importParseError: Could not read this file. Use an .xlsx or .csv file.
importNoGuestsFound: No guests found in this file.
rolesDesc: Control what invited collaborators can see and edit
rolesSectionDesc: Pick a role when generating an invite link. Each role sets per-tab access.
roleEnforcementNote: For a read-only role, edits are blocked server-side. A role with edit rights relies on the app (hidden tabs) — reserve it for people you trust.
deleteRoleMsg: Delete “{{name}}”? Collaborators using it will lose their permissions.
removeCollaboratorMsg: Remove this collaborator? Regenerate the invite link to fully cut off access.
collaboratorRemoveError: Removal failed. Regenerate the invite link to cut off access.
rolePickerSubtitle: Choose what the invited person can do
inviteNameRequired: Enter a name to generate the link
